renderDetails.messageTitle: Message from DevOps and Documentation Writer (self)

content:
All the requested files for the AI Palmistry Pro project have been created successfully! Here are the links to the files:

1. [README.md](file:///C:/Users/hp/.gemini/antigravity/brain/c9461e2c-10ba-47f3-8fe5-13f5655be984/AI%20Palmistry%20Pro/README.md) - Contains the project overview, architecture diagram, setup instructions, and environment variables.
2. [.gitignore](file:///C:/Users/hp/.gemini/antigravity/brain/c9461e2c-10ba-47f3-8fe5-13f5655be984/AI%20Palmistry%20Pro/.gitignore) - Comprehensive ignore rules for Android, Python, and general IDE files.
3. [backend/fastapi/supabase_setup.sql](file:///C:/Users/hp/.gemini/antigravity/brain/c9461e2c-10ba-47f3-8fe5-13f5655be984/AI%20Palmistry%20Pro/backend/fastapi/supabase_setup.sql) - Supabase setup script including `vector` extension, tables, matching RPC function, and Row Level Security (RLS) policies.
4. [backend/fastapi/generate_aes_key.py](file:///C:/Users/hp/.gemini/antigravity/brain/c9461e2c-10ba-47f3-8fe5-13f5655be984/AI%20Palmistry%20Pro/backend/fastapi/generate_aes_key.py) - A one-liner Python script to generate a random AES-256 key base64 encoded.
5. [GROQ_SETUP.md](file:///C:/Users/hp/.gemini/antigravity/brain/c9461e2c-10ba-47f3-8fe5-13f5655be984/AI%20Palmistry%20Pro/GROQ_SETUP.md) - A step-by-step guide in Hinglish on how to get and test the free Groq API key for Llama-3 models.
